creator: ngie@FreeBSD.org
text:
2011/7/14 Sylvio César Teixeira Amorim <scjamorim@bsd.com.br>:
> Please, send again in format .diff and not .shar.

    The following is a patch against 5.5_4. In addition to what I
originally provided via the shar file, this patch fixes the compile
with sctp_tables, and enhances the port Makefile to properly handle
--with[-out]-mib-modules arguments as my group doesn't need some of
MIBs included in the default working set in 5.7.
Thanks,
-Garrett
